transcription.text: Hey, why are you painting out the word whiter? I don't want anybody to know New Ultra Clorox Bleach gets whites even whiter than before. But it does. You know it. I know it. Nobody else needs to know it. Sorry, fellas. New Ultra Clorox Bleach gets even the dirtiest whites like this whiter. For a brighter white you can really see. Now nobody will ever know that New Ultra Clorox Bleach gets whites even whiter than before. Not unless they try it. Oh, brother. New Ultra Clorox Bleach gets whites even whiter than before.
